subcodes.first_line: The Wronged One testifieth that there is none other God but He, and He Who speaketh is verily He Who hath been mentioned in the Books, the Psalms and the Tablets [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد شهد المظلوم انه لا اله الا هو و الذی ینطق انه لهو المذکور فی الکتب و الزبر و الالواح
subcodes.subjects: @proclamation to divines; to religious leaders, @corruption and decline of Islam; of the Shi'ih, @station of the Manifestation of God, @transcendence; unknowability of God
